nodes.label: Bethel (of Judah)
nodes.description: A town in the south of Judah (Josh. 8:17; 12:16).

verses.text: The king of Makkedah, one; the king of Bethel, one;
To them which were in Bethel, and to them which were in south Ramoth, and to them which were in Jattir,
